author: Viggo Meesters
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Open .toml and .ini files as a read-only config tree with search, source view, and parse warnings.

manifest.author: Viggo Meesters
manifest.description: Open .toml and .ini files as a read-only config tree with search, source view, and parse warnings.
manifest.name: TOML INI Viewer

name: TOML INI Viewer

releases.author: viggomeesters
releases.description: Initial read-only TOML and INI config viewer for Obsidian. Includes parsed tree/source modes, search, refresh, warnings, parser fixtures, and render caps.
releases.name: TOML INI Viewer 0.1.0
